title: OT Search Activation
summary: Flagged OT search users now stay on the OT path instead of falling back to legacy polling.

items: Enabled the server-side OT search updater whenever the ot-search rollout flag is used
Stopped recurring legacy search polling from staying active after OT bootstrap for flagged users

title: Changelog System
summary: You can now see what's new after each deploy.

items: Version upgrade banner now shows the latest release summary
Added What's New links to the app menu and landing page
